nodes.name: Psilopogon
nodes.summary: Psilopogon（Psilopogon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联33种鸟类，如Malabar barbet、Crimson-fronted barbet、赤胸拟啄木鸟等33种鸟类。

nodes.name: 汶莱
nodes.summary: 汶莱是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联101种鸟类，包括婆羅洲地杜鵑、Short-toed coucal、Raffles's malkoha等101种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-crowned barbet
nodes.summary: Yellow-crowned barbet（Psilopogon henricii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-crowned barbet。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-crowned barbet
nodes.summary: The yellow-crowned barbet (Psilopogon henricii) is a species of bird in the Megalaimidae family. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, and Thailand. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The yellow-crowned barbet (Psilopogon henricii) is a species of bird in the Megalaimidae family. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia…
